limitations.title: Simulation-only treatment outcomes
limitations.text: Treatment success, failure, reward, and safety penalties are generated by the simulator, not learned from patient treatment outcomes.
limitations.mitigation: State this clearly in every report and use external ECG data only for observation realism, feature validation, and noise stress testing.

limitations.title: Reduced-order heart model
limitations.text: The Gois-Savi/Van der Pol environment is a control-policy test bed, not a full electrophysiology tissue model.
limitations.mitigation: Report it as a toy to medium-fidelity simulator and avoid claims about direct clinical efficacy.

limitations.title: Dimensionless energy units
limitations.text: Simulation pulse amplitudes and energy are dimensionless unless a separate mapping to device Joules is introduced.
limitations.mitigation: Use energy comparisons only as relative within-simulator trade-offs.

limitations.title: Small real-data smoke samples
limitations.text: The included local external ECG samples are enough for pipeline validation but not for definitive ECG encoder validation.
limitations.mitigation: Use the n20 or full bundle with larger downloaded PhysioNet subsets before making quantitative claims.

limitations.title: Simplified ACLS baseline
limitations.text: The ACLS-style baseline encodes selected rhythm thresholds and electrical treatment ideas, not the full clinical algorithm with drugs, sedation, or expert judgment.
limitations.mitigation: Describe it as a rule baseline rather than a complete ACLS implementation.

limitations.title: Not a clinical decision tool
limitations.text: The selector is a research simulator artifact and must not be used for patient care.
limitations.mitigation: Keep this disclaimer in generated summaries, documentation, and paper draft artifacts.
